subject: [PATCH v2 15/18] exfat: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

2026-07-01.patch_summary: This patch converts the iomap operations for the exfat file system to use the new ->iomap_next() callback, which simplifies the code and allows for more efficient handling of I/O mappings. The conversion uses a helper function, iomap_process(), that finishes any previous mapping and produces the next one. This change does not introduce any functional changes and is part of a larger series of patches updating the exfat file system.
